notes: Source is BenQ Middle East spec page (en-me), cross-referenced with Audio General Inc. retailer listing and ManualsLib quick-start manual. The RP6503 is a 65-inch interactive flat panel (education/corporate). Key caveats: (1) RS232 connector listed as 'rs232' (DB9 type inferred from BenQ IFP standard practice — not explicitly stated in spec page); (2) IEC power inlet type inferred from detachable regional power cords shipped in box — not explicitly labeled on spec page; (3) exact front/rear panel distribution of the 7× USB-A ports is partially inferred from the quick-start manual diagram description; (4) the RP6503 also has a separate 'Corporate' variant (RP6503-Corporate) which may differ slightly in connectivity; (5) device is not rack-mountable. The Corporate variant spec page returned a 404 during research.

ports.name: PC Audio In
ports.note: Rear panel, 3.5mm line input to accompany VGA

ports.name: S/PDIF
ports.note: Rear panel, optical digital audio output

ports.name: USB-B 1
ports.note: USB 3.0, touch connection to host PC for rear HDMI inputs

ports.name: USB-B 2
ports.note: USB 3.0, touch connection to host PC

ports.name: USB-B 3
ports.note: USB 3.0, touch connection to host PC for front HDMI input

ports.name: USB-C 1
ports.note: USB 3.0, front panel; supports display input and USB hub

ports.name: USB-C 2
ports.note: USB 3.0 with Power Delivery 65W; rear panel

ports.name: LAN 2 (OPS)
ports.note: 10/100/1000 Mbps, for optional OPS slot-in PC

ports.name: RS232
ports.note: DB9 connector; for serial control. Connector type DB9 inferred from standard BenQ IFP practice — spec page lists '1 × RS-232' without explicit connector label

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet inferred; BenQ ships multiple regional power cords in box confirming detachable cord. Spec states AC 100–240V 50/60Hz. Power inlet connector type not explicitly stated on spec page.
